title: Query flattening causes bad byte-code for a vector IN operator
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE T1(a VARCHAR(255), b INT DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE T2(a VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, n INT UNIQUE, m FLOAT);
INSERT INTO T2(a, n, m) VALUES ('aaa', 0, 1.5);
SELECT * FROM T2 WHERE (a, n) IN (SELECT T1.a, T1.b FROM T1 WHERE T1.b IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Query flattening on vector IN operator causes segfault
